titleStmt.title: SII 42.247: original edition by C Somasundara Rao
No. 247. (A.R. No. 9 of 1956-57.) Narsāpur, Narsapur Taluk, West Godavari District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a pillar set up outside the Madanagōpālasvāmin temple.
This is dated in the regnal year 24, chaitra, śu. 13, Thursday, Vishu-sankrānti. (A.D. 1159, April 2; Sankrānti occurred on 24th March).

Records a gift of 50 buffaloes for the supply of one māna (mānika) of ghee daily for lighting a perpetual lamp in the temple of Mārkaṇḍēśvara-mahādēva of Rājamahēndravara located in Śakaṭamanthani-nāṇḍu, by Sūri-seṭṭi, son of Nāgi-seṭṭi and grandson of Allāḍa-seṭṭi of Jananāthapura. The buffaloes were entrusted to Rēya-bōya, son of Eṟiya-bōya. In addition to this, the donor seems to have gifted one puṭṭi of land.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti [.] sarvvalōkāśraya śrī viṣṇuvarddhana
mahārājula pravarddhamāna vijaya
rājya saṁvatsaraṁbulu 24 gu nēṇṭi caitra śu
ddha trayōdaśiyu guruvāramu
nu viṣuvu saṁkrāṁttināṇḍu jana
nāthapuramuna Allāḍaseṭṭi nāgiseṭṭi
koḍuku mā mala sūriseṭṭi
danaku puṇyamugā śakaṭayamandha
ni nāṇṭi rājamahēṁdravuramu
śrī mārkkaṇḍēśvara mahādēvaraku
Ācaṁdrārkkamu naḍapaṁgalayadi

gāṁ beṭṭina Akhaṇḍavartti dīpamu
nokko(kka)ṇṭiki Eṟiyabōyu koḍuku rē
yabōyini vasamunaṁ beṭṭina yi
nupayeḍlu 50 vīniṁjēkoni nityasāni
yamāneṇḍu nēyi vōyaṁgalavāru [.] śrī
mahēśvara rakṣa [.] puṭṭeṇḍunēla
yu nilupaṭṭuṁ beṭṭitimi
Arikaku
Digital edition of SII 42.247 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
